misconfig_patterns: No security.json — all admin and schema APIs publicly accessible
Admin UI at /solr/ fully open without credentials
DenseVectorField in schema detectable without auth (Solr 9.0+)

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must include solr-spec-version field — uniquely identifies Solr admin API

deployment_tells: GET /solr/admin/info/system returns Solr version + JVM info without auth
Admin UI at /solr/ accessible in browser without credentials
GET /solr/{collection}/schema → DenseVectorField + vectorDimension reveals AI workload
pivot_paths: GET /solr/{collection}/schema → DenseVectorField + vectorDimension for AI workload detection
